runbooks.name: Disk Space Cleanup
runbooks.description: Automated disk cleanup for application servers. Removes old logs, temp files, and rotates compressed archives.
resolution_steps: Rotate and compress logs older than 7 days

runbooks.name: Certificate Expiry Remediation
runbooks.description: Investigate and remediate TLS certificate expiry or mismatch issues.
resolution_steps: Verify certificate expiry date with openssl
Validate new certificate is served correctly

runbooks.name: API 5xx Error Investigation
runbooks.description: Triage and investigate HTTP 5xx errors on API services.
resolution_steps: Check application logs for stack traces
Check recent deployments for rollback candidates

runbooks.name: Latency Investigation Playbook
runbooks.description: Investigate sudden latency increases on services.
resolution_steps: Check service resource utilization (CPU, memory, connections)
